text: Migrate every route and file from the Pages Router to the Next.js App Router. When finished, remove the pages dir entirely. Ensure the proper App Router APIs are used. If a Pages Router API was used that no longer exists in App Router, replace it with the newer version or the new pattern. Make sure to add types.

text: The repository is a small JavaScript Pages Router app with two UI route groups, two API routes, custom document/error/404 handling, and data-loading methods that must be converted to server components, route handlers, metadata, and App Router error conventions. I’m reading the full route and provider code now so the migration preserves the existing behavior rather than just renaming files.

text: The migration shape is clear: `app/layout.tsx` will absorb `_app` and `_document`, `app/error.tsx` and `app/not-found.tsx` will replace the legacy error files, and API handlers will move to `app/api/**/route.ts`. I’ll also convert the provider and route modules to TypeScript, use `metadata`/`generateMetadata`, `headers()`, `notFound()`, `generateStaticParams()`, and typed `Request`/`NextResponse` handlers.

The route files and shared provider are now in App Router form, with the legacy data APIs removed. One detail needs verification against this canary Next version: route context params and handler response typings are version-sensitive, so I’m running TypeScript and the production build before cleaning up any compatibility issues.

text: TypeScript caught a straightforward issue in the new error boundary: the `error` prop was declared in its type but not destructured. The build otherwise compiled the App Router tree successfully, and Next only added its standard generated-types include; I’m fixing that prop usage, then I’ll rerun checks and inspect the final diff.

text:
Migrated the entire app to the Next.js App Router.

Key changes:
- Replaced `pages` routes with typed `app` routes and layouts.
- Converted data APIs to server components, `headers()`, `generateStaticParams()`, `generateMetadata()`, and `notFound()`.
- Replaced API routes with typed App Router route handlers.
- Added typed shared models and TypeScript components.
- Replaced `_app`, `_document`, `_error`, and `404`.
- Removed the `pages` directory entirely.

Verification passed:

- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- `npm run build`

No lint script is configured in `package.json`.
